body.body: db_proxy now routes all DB traffic. db_queries.log has the data. Build: get_slow_query_report() tool in tools/metrics.py (reads ~/.TheIgors/logs/db_queries.log, groups by sql pattern, returns p50/p95/p99 + top offenders). Wire to a PROC habit so Igor can surface this on request. See subsystem_memory DP5 / db_proxy.get_metrics().
body.title: Slow query analysis: tool + habit to surface db_queries.log patterns
body.result: analyze_slow_queries() tool + PROC_SLOW_QUERY_REPORT habit. Top offender: SELECT * FROM memories (2338x, avg 506ms). CREATE INDEX running 710x (boot-only bug). wg_cooccur historical noise. Committed.
